titleStmt.title: SII 38.241: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 241. (A.R. No. 241 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the gōpura, left of entrance Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: It records an order of the chief Madhurāntaka-ppottappi chōḷa, addressed to the group incharge of burning the lamps in the temple, confirming that the levies pulvari, magaḻmai and such old and new taxes as also kārttigai-āḍu which were originally assigned to them would continue to be appropriated by them for burning five lamps to the deity, Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyā-nāyanār with effect from paṅguni of second regnal year. The order said that the tānattār of the temple would also take note of this and duly entered this assignment of these levies as above, in their accounts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maturāntakappottappic
coḻaṉ Olai . tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nā
yaṉār tiruviḷakkukkuṭimakkaḷ kaṇṭu viṭai
taṅkaḷ perkkuk koḷḷum pulvari makaḻmai
Uṭpaṭa paḻavari putuvari kāttikaiāṭu Uṭpaṭa vari
kaḷ tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉārkku tirunun
tā viḷakku Aiñcum Iṭa sarvamāniyamāka
Iraṇṭāvatu paṅkuṉimāta mutal viṭṭo
m Innāyaṉār koyiṟtāṉattārkkukeṟa
taṅkaḷperil Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum cela
vaṟuppatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ce
yvate mānavijayasya §
Digital edition of SII 38.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
